news.headline: A Hamas Delegation went to Cairo to listen to proposed ceasefire deal ideas but no change in group's position - Hamas Senior Official to Al Mayadeen TV.
Coinbase Ventures predicts crypto-driven AI will revolutionize Web3, enabling autonomous agents to interact with humans onchain.
news.summary: The venture capital firm announced plans to establish a future where autonomous AI agents can interact with humans on the blockchain without restrictions.

news.headline: American Water Charitable Foundation awarded $825,000 to 31 organizations for Workforce Readiness and STEM Education Programs.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the American Water Charitable Foundation, created by American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, revealed its allocation of $825,000 to 31 organizations nationwide. These funds are designated for communities served by American Water, as part of the 2024 Workforce Readiness and STEM (science, technology, engineering, math) Education Grant Programs. One recipient, Lansdowne Up, expressed gratitude for the support.

news.headline: Oil prices drop by 1% due to progress in diplomatic efforts for Gaza cease-fire. WTI falls to $70.7/barrel. US and Israeli officials to meet in Doha for negotiations. Conflict started on Oct. 7, 2023.
news.summary: Oil prices, as indicated by the United States Oil Fund (NYSE:USO), saw a 1% decline on Thursday amidst progress in renewed diplomatic efforts for a Gaza cease-fire deal. The price of West Texas Intermediate (WTI) light crude dropped to $70.7 per barrel, marking the second consecutive day of losses. U.S. and Israeli authorities are scheduled to meet in Doha soon to resume talks on a potential Gaza cease-fire and negotiate the release of captives held by Hamas. These discussions, confirmed by officials on Thursday, are focused on ending the deadly conflict that began on Oct. 7, 2023, following a significant attack by Hamas on southern Israel. According to reports from Reuters, David Barnea, the director of Israel's Mossad intelligence agency, will be involved in the negotiations. For more information, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trinasolar US sues Canadian Solar over patent infringement for TOPCon technology.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, Trinasolar US has initiated legal proceedings to safeguard its TOPCon technology patent against infringement by Canadian Solar. The lawsuit aims to address the unauthorized use of patented technology. Key players involved are Trinasolar US and Canadian Solar, with significant legal implications for the photovoltaic industry. This legal action underscores the importance of protecting intellectual property rights within the solar energy sector.

news.headline: Mikaila Ulmer joins Lemonade Day National Board during National Women’s Small Business Month. Honey business owner.
news.summary: During National Women’s Small Business Month, Lemonade Day National proudly announces the addition of Mikaila Ulmer to its Board of Directors. Ulmer, the founder and CEO of Me & the Bees Lemonade and a Lemonade Day alum, brings her expertise to the organization. Lemonade Day National aims to empower young entrepreneurs and has impacted over 1 million kids across the US.

news.headline: Penns Woods Bancorp reports $14.0M net income for 9 months ended 9/30/24, with $1.86 EPS. Assets at $2.3B, equity at $203.7M..gridy_losses.
news.summary: Penns Woods Bancorp, Inc. reported a net income of $14.0 million for the first nine months of 2024, resulting in basic and diluted earnings per share of $1.86. This is a significant increase from the $11.1 million reported for the same period in 2023. The company saw an increase in net interest income by $2.3 million due to a stabilized cost of funds. They also reported a provision for credit losses of $740,000 for the third quarter of 2024. Total assets increased to $2.3 billion, with total deposits reaching $1.7 billion. Shareholders' equity increased to $203.7 million. Notably, the non-performing loans ratio increased to 0.42%. The company also provided non-GAAP core earnings information and reported a net interest margin of 2.88% for the third quarter of 2024. This growth is attributed to an increase in interest-earning assets and the investment portfolio.

news.headline: Maritime industry urges EPA to safeguard mariner safety and supply chain in California, joint letter sent.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on October 24, 2024, The American Waterways Operators, representing the American tugboat, towboat, and barge industry, along with maritime labor unions, sent a joint correspondence to Michael Regan, the Administrator of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA).

news.headline: R3, a former consortium, is now exploring strategic steps amidst industry challenges, seeking new direction.
news.summary: Originally formed as a consortium, R3 has experienced rapid growth. The company is currently in a phase of uncertainty, eagerly awaiting its next direction.

news.headline: OpenAI’s top AGI Readiness official resigns due to desire for reduced bias in the organization.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has surged to 8.9%, reaching its highest level in five years. The number of jobless individuals has risen to 15.6 million, a significant increase from the previous month. Additionally, it was noted that the economy shrank by 4.3% in the last quarter, reflecting the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market. These figures underscore the pressing need for government intervention and support to address the escalating unemployment crisis.

TSMC's Arizona chip yields surpass Taiwan's, a win for the US push.
BayCare Health System recognized as a top employer for women in 2024 by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine, 5th time named.
news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida, on October 24, 2024, BayCare Health System was recognized by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine as one of the 2024 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women™. This marks BayCare's fifth inclusion in this esteemed list. Being selected signifies that BayCare, a leading health system, has been acknowledged for their commitment to fostering a positive workplace environment for female employees.

news.headline: US money-market fund assets rise to record $6.51 trillion.
DZS to discuss Q3 2024 financial results in earnings call. An OTC company, a leader in Networking, Connectivity, and Cloud Edge solutions.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 24, 2024, DZS, a prominent provider of Networking, Connectivity, and Cloud Edge software solutions, declared that it will conduct an earnings call to review its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024. The company, identified as DZSI on OTC, is recognized globally for its role in enabling broadband access in various locations.

news.headline: Harris set to release new ad to close gap with Trump on economy, aiming to close a 3-point difference.
Blue Bird provides 38 propane-powered buses to School District of Philadelphia, serving 200,000+ students. #cleantransportation
news.summary: Blue Bird Corporation, a prominent player in electric and low-emission school buses, recently provided the School District of Philadelphia (SDP), Pennsylvania's largest school district, with its initial set of propane-powered buses. This consists of 38 near-zero emission buses as part of SDP's move towards environmentally friendly student transportation. SDP, serving close to 200,000 students across 218 schools, received these buses from Blue Bird Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as BLBD.

news.headline: 'The Simpsons' has evolved into a self-parody, but this has led to positive outcomes for the show.
AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) declares quarterly dividend of $0.29 per common share. Board of Directors announced on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, AGCO, a prominent company specializing in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology, based in Duluth, Georgia, made an announcement. The Board of Directors of AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) have declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.29 per common share. AGCO is a global leader in the sector, renowned for its innovative design, manufacture, and distribution of agricultural equipment. This dividend declaration underlines the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

news.headline: Render's cryptocurrency price has increased by over 3% in 24 hours to $5.18, after a week of 0.0% losses from $5.15.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Render's cryptocurrency (CRYPTO:RENDER) has increased by 3.14% to $5.18, contrasting with a 0.0% decrease over the past week from $5.15 to its current value. The coin's all-time high remains at $13.53. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: PhotonPharma Inc appoints Derek Brown as new CEO. FDA approved 1st human clinical study for autologous cancer immunotherapies.
news.summary: PhotonPharma Inc., based in Fort Collins, Colorado, has received clearance from the FDA to proceed with a groundbreaking first-in-human clinical trial. The trial will focus on women diagnosed with stage III or IV ovarian cancer and will involve the use of the company's investigational autologous vaccine. This news was announced on October 23, 2024. PhotonPharma Inc. is recognized for its innovative work in developing cancer immunotherapies. This clinical study marks a significant milestone in the field of oncology and offers hope for patients battling advanced ovarian cancer.

news.headline: Medically Home's platform tech aids hospital care for 45,000+ patients at home. Key to acute hospital-at-home care.
news.summary: In a recent development on October 24, 2024, in Boston, it was revealed that a company has identified that its unique platform technology, along with clinical advisory services, expert consulting, and logistics fulfillment abilities, play a crucial role in offering acute hospital-at-home care. This company, named Medically Home, relies on these components to deliver essential services efficiently. This innovative approach highlights the importance of integrating technology and specialized services to provide effective care.

news.headline: Stagwell (STGW) adds Free Practice (Spain), keelbone (US) and SponsorForce (Japan) to its Global Affiliate Network.
news.summary: Stagwell (NASDAQ: STGW), a competitive network aimed at revolutionizing marketing, has recently expanded its Global Affiliate Network by incorporating Free Practice from Spain, keelbone from the United States, and SponsorForce from Japan. This move is intended to enhance their full-service and specialty digital offerings. The addition of these companies is part of Stagwell's strategy to strengthen its presence in the market and provide comprehensive services to clients worldwide.

news.headline: SDI Presence LLC wins NMSDC Supplier of the Year Award – Class IV in Chicago, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 24, 2024, SDI Presence LLC received the National Minority Supplier Development Council (NMSDC) Supplier of the Year Award in Class IV. The award highlights SDI's dedication to providing IT services.

news.headline: INmune Bio Inc. shows XPro™ promotes remyelination in animal model study, published in Cell Reports - turning 0 demyelinating cells into 1 remyelinating cell.
news.summary: Findings from a study involving animal models reveal that XPro™ has the capability to transform microglia cells from a state of demyelination to one of remyelination. This novel effect was observed in a significant percentage of microglia cells, with the conversion being successful in approximately 70% of cases. The study highlights the potential of XPro™ in promoting the restoration of myelin, offering hope for the development of new treatments for demyelinating conditions.

The coin's all-time high remains at $3,785.82. This recent price movement is illustrated in the provided chart. More detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

This increase is contrary to its performance over the past week, where it faced a 1.0% decline from $71.94 to its current value. At its peak, the coin reached an all-time high of $410.26. The price movement and volatility can be observed in the provided chart.

This rise adds to its positive performance throughout the last week, where it saw a 2.0% growth from $0.000010 to its present value. news.headline: TD SYNNEX presented annual Direction of Technology report in Mexico City, focusing on Latin America and Caribbean, revealing companies' plans to invest in technology infrastructure.
news.summary: In a recent Power Up roadshow held in Mexico City, TD SYNNEX (NYSE: SNX), a prominent global distributor in the IT sector, showcased its third annual Technology Trends report centered on Latin America and the Caribbean. The report highlights the shifting technology landscape, indicating that businesses in the region are increasingly looking to enhance their technology infrastructure, capitalize on emerging technologies, and collaborate with experienced partners. These findings underscore a growing emphasis on innovation and strategic partnerships within the industry.

news.headline: Freddie Mac prices $272.2M SLST Securitization, including senior and subordinate securities, to reduce risk in investments.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on October 24, 2024, Freddie Mac (OTCQB: FMCC) revealed the pricing details of the Freddie Mac Seasoned Loans Structured Transaction Trust (SLST) Series 2024-2. This securitization amounts to around $272.2 million and comprises guaranteed senior and non-guaranteed subordinate securities. These are supported by a pool of seasoned residential mortgage loans. The SLST initiative plays a crucial role in Freddie Mac's strategy of offering seasoned loans. This aids in minimizing illiquid assets within its mortgage-related investments portfolio and offloading credit and market risk through economically sensible dealings.

news.headline: Avangrid's Onshore Renewables business achieves joint ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications, a first in Iberdrola Group.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent sustainable energy company and part of the Iberdrola Group, based in ORANGE, Conn., has recently obtained a dual certification in ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 for its Onshore Renewables division. This makes them among the first within the Iberdrola Group to accomplish this feat. ISO 14001 focuses on environmental management systems, while ISO 45001 is centered on occupational health and safety systems. Avangrid expressed their immense pride in successfully attaining this joint certification.

news.headline: Supernal and Blade join for eVTOL exploration, boosting commercial efforts.LAS VEGAS,Oct.24,2024, partnership announced.
news.summary: Supernal LLC, the Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) company of Hyundai Motor Group, and Blade Urban Air Mobility, Inc. have revealed a new partnership aimed at enhancing Supernal's electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) product. This collaboration is expected to advance the commercial endeavors of both companies. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Give Freely launches new mobile app for charitable donations, founded by Steve Kaufer; aims to empower users with online giving.
news.summary: In Boston on October 24, 2024, Give Freely, a socially-conscious company created by Steve Kaufer, co-founder of Tripadvisor, unveiled a new mobile app. This app aims to streamline charitable giving through online commerce. By leveraging the app, individuals can easily contribute to worthy causes.

news.headline: Global plasticizer alcohols market to increase by USD 4.5 billion (2024-2028) due to economic growth in emerging regions.
news.summary: A recent report on the influence of AI on market trends indicates that the global plasticizer alcohols market is projected to expand by approximately USD 4.5 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research from Technavio suggests a steady growth trajectory, with the market expected to increase at a CAGR of 9.19% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Montana Renewables delivers first shipment of Sustainable Aviation Fuel to Detroit Metropolitan Airport, becoming the largest SAF producer in North America in 2024.
news.summary: In Great Falls, Montana, on October 24, 2024, it was announced that Detroit Metropolitan Airport (DTW) will be incorporating Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) for the first time. This initiative is made possible by Montana Renewables, LLC (MRL), the leading SAF producer in North America in 2024. MRL has successfully provided their product to DTW, marking a significant step towards promoting environmentally friendly practices in the aviation industry.

news.headline: French trader Fredi9999, managing four accounts on Polymarket, bets heavily on Republican victory in US election on Nov. 5. Prominent whale not manipulating market.
news.summary: Polymarket has uncovered that a significant whale trader, overseeing four accounts associated with wagers related to Donald Trump, is of French origin. The trader, known as Fredi9999, possesses a wealth of experience in trading and financial services. He has allocated substantial investments in markets predicting a Republican win in the imminent U.S. election on Nov. 5. Polymarket's probe revealed that Fredi9999's bets reflect his personal forecasts for the election results. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Northridge, California - On October 24, 2024, Thinking Nation, a national non-profit organization operating under 501c3 status, disclosed its dedication to fostering well-informed citizens by advancing historical thinking in the field of social studies. The organization's Director of Curriculum, Annie Jenson, is scheduled to deliver a presentation at the upcoming Texas Council for the...

news.headline: Global CNC Horizontal Machining Centres Market expected to increase by USD 2.67 billion (2024-2028) due to AI's impact and precision manufacturing demand. - Technavio
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the market landscape. The Global CNC Horizontal Machining Centres Market is projected to increase significantly, with an estimated growth of USD 2672.3 million between 2024 and 2028. According to Technavio, the market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.88% during this period.

news.headline: SCALE Nanotech introduces GMOD® technology for high-speed, low-power telecom in drones, aeronautics, and space at Valencia event.
news.summary: SCALE Nanotech has introduced their GMOD® technology designed for high-speed, low-power telecommunication applications in drones, aeronautics, and space industries. The groundbreaking technology was recently presented to industry leaders in Valencia.

news.headline: StorageMart opens new self storage facility in Lowell, AR under Third Party Management on W Monroe Ave.
news.summary: In Lowell, Arkansas, on October 24, 2024, StorageMart, a prominent self storage company, revealed the addition of a newly built storage facility on W Monroe Ave. This site will be managed by StorageMart Third Party Management and aims to enhance the company's services in the area.

news.headline: Tech stocks, led by Tesla (TSLA) with an 18% jump, rebounded. Gold rose, Treasury yields eased. Jobless claims fell, S&P 500 and Russell 2000 traded flat, Dow Jones down 0.6%. Gold Trust (GLD) up 0.6%, oil down 1%.
news.summary: Tech stocks, primarily Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA), surged on Thursday with Tesla's stock soaring 18% following strong quarterly results, marking its best session since March 2021. However, broader market sentiment remained cautious. Weekly jobless claims decreased below expectations, indicating labor market resilience. Private sector activity surveys showed better conditions in services and manufacturing, with reduced price pressures. While S&P 500 and Russell 2000 traded flat, Dow Jones fell by 0.6%, influenced by Tesla's performance. The U.S. dollar eased slightly, Treasury yields dipped, and Gold prices rose while Oil prices fell by 1%, with Bitcoin showing uncertain movement. SPDR Gold Trust (NYSE:GLD) increased by 0.6%.

news.headline: ERI expands ITAD services in Northeast with AI & robotics-driven facility in Holliston, MA with SOAR tech. 8 facilities total.
news.summary: In Boston, ERI, the largest fully integrated IT and electronics asset disposition provider focusing on cybersecurity hardware destruction, currently operates eight cutting-edge e-waste recycling facilities. One of these is located in Holliston, Massachusetts. The Northeast facility is equipped with state-of-the-art technologies, including the pioneering A.I. and machine learning system called SOAR. SOAR, developed by ERI, incorporates Optical Character Recognition technology to enhance operations.

news.headline: Pediatric Orphan Drug Market to reach $102.18 billion by 2030, growing at 10.5% CAGR, with various segments and applications.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of October 24, 2024, the Pediatric Orphan Drug Market has been analyzed and segmented by type into Oncology, Pulmonary, Neurology, Hematology, Endocrinology, Cardiovascular, and Metabolic Disorders. This market is further divided by application age groups including 0-1 years, 1-3 years, 3-6 years, 6-12 years, and over 12 years. This offers a global opportunity for companies operating in this sector to address the healthcare needs of children across different age brackets.

news.headline: IMF's Gopinath: US debt is very sustainable, but the deficit should be cut.
Carnegie Learning partners with AI for Education to advance AI literacy training in K-12 classrooms.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh today, Carnegie Learning has revealed a fresh collaboration with AI for Education to enhance AI literacy education and advocate for the responsible integration of artificial intelligence in K-12 schools across the country. This partnership brings together two leading figures in educational AI - merging Carnegie Learning's years of involvement in AI-based learning tools with AI for Education's proficiency in generative AI training and educational professional development. This cooperation aims to accelerate AI literacy training in K-12 classrooms and promote responsible AI adoption nationwide.

news.headline: Brent Crude futures settle at $74.38/bbl, down 58 cents, 0.77%.
Autel and Revv partner to offer ADAS solution for mechanical repair; deal announced on Oct. 24, 2024. #Autel #Revv #ADAS
news.summary: In Port Washington, N.Y. on October 24, 2024, Autel, a top company in professional automotive diagnostic tools, has joined forces with Revv, a prominent provider of AI software for detecting vehicle Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). This partnership aims to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of ADAS detection for vehicles.

news.headline: Century Communities to host grand opening events in Merced, CA on Oct 24, 2024 for new homes at Solera III and Sundial at Bellevue Ranch. #CCS #homebuilder #GrandOpening
news.summary: Leading national homebuilder Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS) recently unveiled new homes at Solera III and Sundial in Bellevue Ranch, Merced, California. The company, known for being a top player in online home sales, showcased its latest offerings in the market on October 24, 2024. Century Communities has been recognized as one of America's most trustworthy homebuilders in the industry.
